records.m_Talk_ENG: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To fulfill the duty of the Star Guide, whose line died young for generations, one had to sense starlight as early as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To fulfill the duty of the Star Guide, whose line died young for generations, one had to sense starlight as early as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To fulfill the duty of the Star Guide, whose line died young for generations, one had to sense starlight as early as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one spoke of how unjust it was for a child heir to bear the weight of it all.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one spoke of how unjust it was for a child heir to bear the weight of it all.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one spoke of how unjust it was for a child heir to bear the weight of it all.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The legend of the Guide of leading the people was more precious to the house than anything else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The legend of the Guide of leading the people was more precious to the house than anything else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The legend of the Guide of leading the people was more precious to the house than anything else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: By imperial decree, the traitor who followed the Demon Lord is hereby sentenced to death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: By imperial decree, the traitor who followed the Demon Lord is hereby sentenced to death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: By imperial decree, the traitor who followed the Demon Lord is hereby sentenced to death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Prisoner. Any last words before the execution?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Prisoner. Any last words before the execution?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Prisoner. Any last words before the execution?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The great Nehemoth has descended to bid this world farewell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The great Nehemoth has descended to bid this world farewell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The great Nehemoth has descended to bid this world farewell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wretches shall be engulfed by Nahema's flames and turned to ash...!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wretches shall be engulfed by Nahema's flames and turned to ash...!!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wretches shall be engulfed by Nahema's flames and turned to ash...!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Carry out the sentence.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Carry out the sentence.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Carry out the sentence.

records.m_Talk_ENG: O, Demon Lord... please...
records.m_Talk_DEU: O, Demon Lord... please...
records.m_Talk_FRA: O, Demon Lord... please...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Grant me... salvation...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Grant me... salvation...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Grant me... salvation...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watch closely. That is the end of a star that strayed from its path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watch closely. That is the end of a star that strayed from its path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watch closely. That is the end of a star that strayed from its path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before they can drag the world into despair, it falls to us, the bloodline of the Star Guide, to lead our people down the righteous path.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before they can drag the world into despair, it falls to us, the bloodline of the Star Guide, to lead our people down the righteous path.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before they can drag the world into despair, it falls to us, the bloodline of the Star Guide, to lead our people down the righteous path.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're clever. You understand what I mean, don't you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're clever. You understand what I mean, don't you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're clever. You understand what I mean, don't you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes, Father.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes, Father.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes, Father.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Remember this sight, Grace.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Remember this sight, Grace.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Remember this sight, Grace.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you ever fail in judgment, it'll be the innocent who end up in that pool of blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you ever fail in judgment, it'll be the innocent who end up in that pool of blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you ever fail in judgment, it'll be the innocent who end up in that pool of blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never resented a life lived according to someone else's will.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never resented a life lived according to someone else's will.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never resented a life lived according to someone else's will.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fulfilling the role I was given without complaint wasn't difficult for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fulfilling the role I was given without complaint wasn't difficult for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fulfilling the role I was given without complaint wasn't difficult for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Star Guide, she hasn't smiled lately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Star Guide, she hasn't smiled lately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Star Guide, she hasn't smiled lately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's been skipping meals too. Perhaps she's been pushing herself too hard?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's been skipping meals too. Perhaps she's been pushing herself too hard?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's been skipping meals too. Perhaps she's been pushing herself too hard?

records.m_Talk_ENG: She can't help it. After all those losses, the royal family's been pressuring the Count.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She can't help it. After all those losses, the royal family's been pressuring the Count.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She can't help it. After all those losses, the royal family's been pressuring the Count.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With continents vanishing left and right, how could we ask them to wait for the forging of an Armament?
records.m_Talk_DEU: With continents vanishing left and right, how could we ask them to wait for the forging of an Armament?
records.m_Talk_FRA: With continents vanishing left and right, how could we ask them to wait for the forging of an Armament?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once my training as an heir was complete, I began traveling the Empire with an escort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once my training as an heir was complete, I began traveling the Empire with an escort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once my training as an heir was complete, I began traveling the Empire with an escort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most of my journey was through famine-stricken lands, nothing like the wealthy County.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most of my journey was through famine-stricken lands, nothing like the wealthy County.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most of my journey was through famine-stricken lands, nothing like the wealthy County.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, my body remained unscathed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, my body remained unscathed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, my body remained unscathed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Star Guide, are you sure you're fine with a regular inn?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Star Guide, are you sure you're fine with a regular inn?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Star Guide, are you sure you're fine with a regular inn?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're going out alone in a strange village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're going out alone in a strange village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're going out alone in a strange village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.
records.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.
records.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.

records.m_Talk_ENG: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. Please bring them in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. Please bring them in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. Please bring them in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What should I do in the meantime...
records.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do in the meantime...
records.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do in the meantime...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon me, Madam.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon me, Madam.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon me, Madam.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Madam? Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Madam? Is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Madam? Is something wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm unmarried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm unmarried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm unmarried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did the chief tell you about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did the chief tell you about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did the chief tell you about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.

records.m_Talk_ENG: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...

records.m_Talk_ENG: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a strange one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a strange one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a strange one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My uncle says that all the time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My uncle says that all the time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My uncle says that all the time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I ask your name?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask your name?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask your name?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Allen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Allen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Allen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My earliest memory was sitting alone in an empty room, listening to a voice that seemed like an auditory hallucination.

root.m_Talk_DEU: Star Guide, are you sure you're fine with a regular inn?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Star Guide, are you sure you're fine with a regular inn?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. Just being able to stretch my legs is already a generous comfort.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll take a look around the village. You're all free to rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're going out alone in a strange village?
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're going out alone in a strange village?
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're going out alone in a strange village?

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I stayed, I'd only disrupt your rest.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm more than capable of protecting myself, so there's no need to worry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm... Still, just don't stay out too late.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course.

root.m_Talk_ENG: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.
root.m_Talk_DEU: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.
root.m_Talk_FRA: *...Sigh* She really does think the world revolves around her. She's so hard to please.

root.m_Talk_ENG: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: They call her the Guide and treat her like royalty. She probably believes it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's the type who doesn't even flinch when knights die.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To her, we're just accessories to make her shine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Still, she acts sweet, so it makes things easier for us. If she sheds a few tears, she gets away with everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh wow. No wonder you didn't get kicked out after stealing that gold bar last time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Careful. One day the great Star Guide might smite you from above.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, is this the room where the Birmingham's people are staying?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've come to deliver the supplies the village chief requested.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. Please bring them in.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. Please bring them in.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. Please bring them in.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So slow. The sun won't set for a while yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What should I do in the meantime...
root.m_Talk_DEU: What should I do in the meantime...
root.m_Talk_FRA: What should I do in the meantime...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Pardon me, Madam.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Pardon me, Madam.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Pardon me, Madam.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This area falls within the roaming range of the sheep. I'd like to ask you to move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We only just finished building the fence, but they're rowdy and like to ram into things.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Madam? Is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Madam? Is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Madam? Is something wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm unmarried.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm unmarried.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm unmarried.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's an important fact, so I'll say it again. I'm unmarried.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...My apologies. That was rude of me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I must insist again. For your own safety, it's best you move.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If anything were to happen to you, Milady, the villagers would bear the blame.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Milady, is it...? You've never seen my face before. Why assume that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your genteel attire and unfamiliar face clearly mark you as an outsider.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No one would leave the capital for a rural life at a time like this, so I figured you must be someone of importance from the Empire.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You seem to be around my age, yet you're remarkably perceptive.

root.m_Talk_ENG: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: "Remarkably" feels a bit much for a rural man like me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Did the chief tell you about me?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Did the chief tell you about me?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Did the chief tell you about me?

root.m_Talk_ENG: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You may lack a knight's polish, but your body shows signs of formal training.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You speak well with nobles, too, which tells me you once lived in the capital.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I only ever aspired to be a knight. Nothing more.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Surprising. You'd hold your own even among Imperial knights.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I passed the test, yes, but I was more concerned for my hometown's safety.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I never wanted rank, so now I just try to live by what I was taught.

root.m_Talk_ENG: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For someone without ambition, you dress quite well.

root.m_Talk_ENG: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: When you first approached me, I thought you were flirting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Can't visit a noble's residence covered in dust, so I change after work.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've received more education than most in the village, so I try to help out where I can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It was hard keeping my distance from people, but I had confidence in reading their hearts.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yet this quiet young man from a nowhere village...

root.m_Talk_ENG: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: He held none of the expectations people usually had for me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're a strange one.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're a strange one.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're a strange one.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My uncle says that all the time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My uncle says that all the time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My uncle says that all the time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: May I ask your name?
root.m_Talk_DEU: May I ask your name?
root.m_Talk_FRA: May I ask your name?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Allen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Allen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Allen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm Allen, the village shepherd.
